jason_swett.name: Jason Swett
jason_swett.title: Testing Expert
jason_swett.dialogBefore:
I am feeling a little
blocked. Maybe a code review
will loosen things up.
jason_swett.dialogAfter:
Your tests are green across
the board. Excuse me I need
to make a run for
the bathroom.

open_source_marco.name: Open Source Marco
open_source_marco.title: Open Source Maintainer
open_source_marco.dialogBefore: Do you know what's possible in the Rails view layer?
open_source_marco.dialogAfter: You will need Herb where you are going. Use it well.

nate_berkopec.name: Nate Berkopec
nate_berkopec.title: Performance Engineer
nate_berkopec.dialogBefore: Measure, don't guess. That's the Speedshop way. Let's see if your gems can handle real performance bugs.
nate_berkopec.dialogAfter: Fast and efficient. You've earned the Performance Pass. I prefer to take Proposite with me when tackling particularly nasty N+1s.

dhh.name: DHH
dhh.title: Rails Creator
dhh.dialogBefore:
You've made it to the launch pad.
But the rocket only has room
for real Rails developers.
Let's see if your gems can
handle the nastiest bugs.
dhh.dialogAfter:
Welcome aboard.
Take the Captain's Pass.
The rocket is waiting.
See you in space!
